name: Black Forest Cake # 3
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake according to package instructions. Spoon the batter into 3 greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
2. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the middle comes out clean.
3. Cool in the pans on wire racks for ten minutes. Remove from the pans; cool completely on wire racks.
4. In a small saucepan, combine sugar and water. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in 2 tablespoons cherry liqueur and let cool.
5. Brush the syrup on top of the cake layers. Let stand for 5 minutes.
6. Beat whipped cream at medium speed until foamy. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form.
7. Slowly add 1/4 cup cherry liqueur while beating.
8. Spread on the first cake layer, sprinkling with 1/3 of chopped cherries and 1/4 cup chocolate morsels.
9. Add the second cake layer; repeat.
10. Top with the third cake layer and spread the top and sides with the remaining whipped cream mixture.
11. Sprinkle with the remaining cherries and chocolate morsels.
12. I had a little whipped cream left over, so I piped a few rosettes on top, placing a whole maraschino cherry in each.
13. Store in the fridge.
